name: Crayola Colored Pencils (36ct), Kids Pencil Set, Pre-Sharpened Coloring Book Pencils for Kids & Adults, Arts & Crafts Supplies, Coloring Gift, Ages 3+
bullets: 36 CRAYOLA COLORED PENCILS: Explore a spectrum of color with 36 distinct colored pencils that transform artwork into vibrant masterpieces.
KIDS ART SUPPLIES: Ignite your child’s artistic potential with this vibrant set of Crayola Colored Pencils. Perfect for nurturing creativity and self-expression.
BACK TO SCHOOL SUPPLIES: Enhance educational and creative activities with these essential kids' pencils for school.
IDEAL FOR COLORING BOOKS: Designed to glide smoothly across the page, these pencils bring coloring books to life.
CLASSROOM SUPPLIES: Stock up on bulk colored pencils for classroom activities, enhancing group projects, and making learning more colorful and fun.
PRESHARPENED & DURABLE: Soft cores won't break easily, and presharpened tips are ready for use right out of the box.
description: Dive into a world of color with this bulk set of 36 Crayola Colored Pencils. Each pencil is a portal to a spectrum of creativity, transforming blank canvases into vibrant masterpieces. These pencils are more than just coloring tools, they’re catalysts for artistic growth, perfect for nurturing creativity and self-expression in young artists. As the back-to-school season approaches, these colored pencils become an essential part of kids’ school supplies. They enhance educational and creative activities, making learning more colorful and fun. Designed to glide smoothly across the page, these pen

reviews.name: Geovana Hadam
reviews.title: Great quality at a good value
reviews.body: These Crayola colored pencils have rich, vibrant colors and are easy to use. They color smoothly, sharpen well, and are perfect for coloring books I used in 65 lbs White Cardstock.

reviews.name: Monty
reviews.title: Quality product for hours of pleasure.
reviews.body: Super time-sensitive delivery. A Swell assortment of colors well beyond “the basic”. Easy to hold; uniformly sharp with what feels like more of a crayons- tho it is a pencil. Quality of product, packaging, and cost are noteworthy.

reviews.name: Abigail Phung
reviews.title: SO MANY COLORS!
reviews.body: I bought this specifically so my two kids can share. They do a lot of color by numbers and they keep fighting over the one red in the box they had. Having 5 different reds just means they can work on the same page (in their individual books) together and help each other. Can never go wrong with Crayola. Great quality, easily sharpened, decent grip for my 4YO’s tiny hands, and works on just about…

reviews.name: Brenda
reviews.title: Great awesome color pencils
reviews.body: This coloring pencils are great! I use them all the time and it was time for a new box. The color is bright and pretty. Easy to sharpen and long lasting. They are also great price point so is a good value!
